name: Depraved Alluring Languor
outcome: The trio of voluptuous slime women lazily caress each other in perfect synchronization, letting out tempting cooing sighs as their shiny gooey bodies slip against each other in squishing wobbling curvaceous displays.|n|Their obscene movements and wanton gyrations draw your gaze down across their luscious busts, down to their invitingly swaying hips and thick gooey asses, a sliding hand eventually catching your gaze as it glides back over their alluringly smooth skin up to their lusty welcoming smiles.
miss: The trio of voluptuous slime women idly touch and rub against each other in perfect synchronization, but you manage to ignore the alluring display!
